# Test Strategy — my-app
**Project:** `my-app`
**Target URL:** `https://novartis.com`
**Generated by:** Playwright Context Analyst
**Requested test types:** Functional / E2E *(scoped by task)*

---

## §0. Requested Test Types (scope filter)

| Category | In Scope |
|---|---|
| Functional / E2E | ✅ Always in scope |
| Visual / Design Parity | ❌ No Figma source provided |
| Accessibility (a11y) | ❌ Not requested |
| Cross-Browser | ❌ Not requested |
| Responsive / Mobile | ❌ Not requested |
| Regression | ❌ Not requested |
| API / Integration | ❌ Not requested |
| Performance | ❌ Not requested |
| Security (baseline) | ❌ Not requested |

Only **Functional / E2E** test cases are in scope for this run.

---

## §1. Environment

| Variable | Value | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `TEST_URL` | `novartis.com` | ⚠️ Set — confirm scheme (`https://`) |
| `TEST_AUTH_URL` | *(empty)* | ❌ Missing — collect from user |
| `TEST_USER` | *(empty)* | ❌ Missing — collect from user |
| `TEST_PASS` | *(empty)* | ❌ Missing — collect from user |
| `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` | *(empty)* | ❌ Missing — collect from user |

> **Action required before any test run:** `TEST_USER`, `TEST_PASS`, `TEST_AUTH_URL`, and
> `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` must be populated in `projects/my-app/.env`.

**Runtime config (from `playwright.config.ts`):**
- Viewport: `1920×1080`, `deviceScaleFactor: 1`
- Browser: Chromium (Desktop Chrome, `--start-maximized`)
- Workers: `1` (serial)
- Screenshots: `on` (every test)
- Traces: `retain-on-failure`
- Report: HTML + JSON under `projects/my-app/playwright-report/` and `projects/my-app/test-results.json`

---

## §2. Authentication

**Type:** Microsoft Azure AD via AWS Cognito federation (canonical pattern).

**Login flow:**
1. Navigate to `TEST_AUTH_URL` (or `TEST_URL` if no dedicated auth URL).
2. App redirects → Cognito Hosted UI → Microsoft `login.microsoftonline.com`.
3. **Email screen:** fill `input[type="email"], input[name="loginfmt"]` → click `input[type="submit"][value="Next"]`.
4. **Password screen:** fill `input[type="password"], input[name="passwd"]` → click `input[type="submit"][value="Sign in"]`.
5. **"Stay signed in?" interstitial** (optional, `timeout: 5000`): click `input[type="submit"][value="Yes"]` if visible.
6. Wait for redirect back to `TEST_URL` origin + `networkidle`.

**Auth helper:** `projects/my-app/tests/helpers/auth.helper.ts` ✅ (present, canonical template)

**Session strategy:** Log in **once** (`beforeAll` / `storageState`), reuse across all tests.
- `storageState` path: `projects/my-app/auth-state.json` (written on first login).

> ⚠️ `identity_provider` value (`<cognito-prefix>-idp`) is not yet confirmed. The Test Planner
> must capture the Cognito redirect URL during auth exploration and record the prefix in
> `project-memory.md` §2.

---

## §3. Application Architecture

**Source code:** No local `src/` directory exists for `my-app`. `novartis.com` is an externally
hosted production website. Architecture below is derived from domain knowledge and must be
**validated by the Test Planner via UI exploration** before generating tests.

### Tech Stack (inferred from external site)
| Layer | Technology | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Frontend | Unknown — to be confirmed by Planner | Public corporate website |
| Auth | Azure AD via AWS Cognito | Per `.env` pattern |
| Hosting | External CDN / cloud | novartis.com |

### Routes Table (candidate — to be validated by Test Planner)

| Route | Component / Page | Auth Required? | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/` | Homepage / Landing | ❓ TBC | Whole-page test primary target |
| `/about` or equiv. | About/Company page | ❓ TBC | To be confirmed by Planner |
| `/careers` or equiv. | Careers page | ❓ TBC | Likely public |
| `/contact` or equiv. | Contact page | ❓ TBC | May have a form |
| `/login` or equiv. | Login / Auth entry | ✅ (triggers Azure AD) | Entry point for auth flow |

> The Test Planner MUST enumerate actual routes by navigating the live site and comparing to this table.

### Key UI Regions (inferred for whole-page test)
| Region | Expected Elements |
|---|---|
| Header | Logo, primary navigation (`nav`), possibly a CTA button |
| Hero / Banner | Main `h1` heading, sub-heading, hero image |
| Body | Page-specific content sections |
| Footer | Links, copyright, legal notices |

---

## §4. Design Source of Truth

**Figma source:** ❌ None provided (no `FIGMA_FILE_URL`, no `FIGMA_FILE_KEY`, no design images in `docs/design/`).

**Consequence:** Visual / Design Parity tests are **not in scope** for this run. Functional / E2E tests will use DOM assertions (element presence, text content, structural integrity) derived from source-code analysis and Test Planner's UI exploration.

> If a Figma file is available in future runs, add `FIGMA_FILE_URL` to `projects/my-app/.env` and re-run the Context Analyst.

---

## §5. Business Rules

| ID | Rule | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| BR-001 | The homepage (`/`) must load with HTTP 200 and render without JS errors | URL: `novartis.com` | Core health check |
| BR-002 | The page `<title>` must be non-empty and meaningful (not "Untitled") | Web standard | Whole-page test |
| BR-003 | A primary navigation element (`nav` or `[role="navigation"]`) must be present and visible | Web standard / a11y | Structural integrity |
| BR-004 | At least one `<h1>` heading must be present on the page | Web standard | Whole-page test |
| BR-005 | All images must have non-empty `alt` attributes | WCAG 2.1 / web standard | Basic a11y within E2E |
| BR-006 | Footer region must be present and contain at least one link | Common CMS pattern | Structural integrity |
| BR-007 | No broken internal navigation links in the primary nav | Standard QA | Link integrity |
| BR-008 | Page must redirect `http://` to `https://` (secure transport) | Security baseline | Observable from redirect |

---

## §6. Test Cases

> Scope: **Functional / E2E only** (no Design / Visual rows — no Figma source available).
> User-provided `docs/actualtestcases.csv` was empty (headers only). All cases below are discovered via source-code/domain analysis.
> The **Test Planner** will validate these, add selectors, and write the final `docs/actualtestcases.csv`.

| TC# | Summary | Type | Business Rule | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TC-001 | Homepage loads successfully | Functional / E2E | BR-001 | Navigate to `TEST_URL`; assert HTTP 200 response and no console errors |
| TC-002 | Page title is present and non-empty | Functional / E2E | BR-002 | Assert `document.title` is non-empty and does not equal "Untitled" |
| TC-003 | Primary navigation is visible | Functional / E2E | BR-003 | Assert `nav` or `[role="navigation"]` is visible on the page |
| TC-004 | At least one H1 heading exists | Functional / E2E | BR-004 | Assert `h1` count ≥ 1 and first `h1` is non-empty |
| TC-005 | All images have alt text | Functional / E2E | BR-005 | Assert no `<img>` has an empty or missing `alt` attribute |
| TC-006 | Footer is present and contains links | Functional / E2E | BR-006 | Assert `footer` or `[role="contentinfo"]` is visible and contains ≥ 1 `<a>` |
| TC-007 | Primary nav links are not broken | Functional / E2E | BR-007 | Click each top-level nav link; assert destination loads (HTTP 200, no crash) |
| TC-008 | HTTP redirects to HTTPS | Functional / E2E | BR-008 | Navigate to `http://novartis.com`; assert final URL is `https://` |
| TC-009 | Whole-page screenshot baseline | Functional / E2E | BR-001 | Full-page screenshot of homepage stored as evidence; no visual assertion (no Figma) |
| TC-010 | Authentication entry point redirects to Azure AD | Functional / E2E | BR-001 | Navigate to auth/login entry; assert redirect reaches `login.microsoftonline.com` |

---

## §7. Open Items / Blockers for Test Planner

1. **Missing credentials** — `TEST_USER`, `TEST_PASS`, `TEST_AUTH_URL`, `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` must be
   populated in `projects/my-app/.env` before auth-dependent tests can run.
2. **Validate `TEST_URL` scheme** — confirm `novartis.com` should be `https://novartis.com` (add
   scheme to `.env`).
3. **Route confirmation** — Test Planner must enumerate actual routes on the live site and update the
   routes table in §3.
4. **Selector confirmation** — `nav`, `h1`, `footer` selectors are inferred; Test Planner must confirm
   actual DOM selectors via UI exploration.
5. **Auth flow confirmation** — `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` (`<cognito-prefix>-idp`) must be captured from the
   Cognito redirect URL during auth exploration.
6. **No Figma source** — Visual parity is out of scope until a Figma URL is provided.

---

*Handoff: Context Analyst stage complete. → **Test Planner** to proceed with UI exploration, route
validation, selector extraction, and `docs/actualtestcases.csv` population.*
